reason: Browser-use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and returned the result in the chat response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut application with agent list in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260704-004209-eg0l" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface and settings panels
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was sent successfully and agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed the task in 12 seconds and returned response

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"." and confirms "Done — the page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". I've closed the browser."
